locale.hint: Select plugin language / 选择插件语言

default_mute_duration.description: Default mute duration (seconds) / 默认禁言时长（秒）
default_mute_duration.hint: Used when no duration is specified in /bot mute / 不指定时长时的默认禁言秒数

default_welcome_enabled.description: Welcome enabled by default / 新人欢迎默认开启
default_welcome_enabled.hint: Whether welcome messages are enabled for new groups / 新群是否默认开启欢迎消息

default_welcome_message.description: Default welcome message / 默认欢迎消息
default_welcome_message.hint: Leave empty to use i18n default / 留空则使用语言包中的默认欢迎语

max_recall_count.description: Max recall count / 最大撤回条数
max_recall_count.hint: Maximum messages that can be recalled at once / 单次最多撤回的消息条数

default_announce_confirm_required.description: Announcement requires confirmation / 公告需要群成员确认
default_announce_confirm_required.hint: Whether announcements require group members to confirm / 发布的公告是否需要群成员确认

default_announce_pinned.hint: Whether announcements are pinned / 发布的公告是否置顶
